name: Mr. Sketch Scented Markers, Chisel Tip, Assorted Colors, 22 Count - Fun for Kids, Coloring, Spark Creativity, Arts & Crafts
bullets: Exciting array of scents help spark creativity
Bold shades create a fun coloring experience
Large cylinder is easy for kids to handle
Safe for children over 3 years of age, AP certified
Includes 22 assorted colors that fuel kids' imagination
Non-Toxic: The ink is certified as non-toxic, making them suitable for school and home use
description: Boost your child’s creativity and let them unleash their imagination with the Mr. Sketch Scented Watercolor Markers! Sold as a pack of 22, each marker offers a vibrant hue and a fun, corresponding scent. The large barrel design is easy for little hands to grip while the versatile chisel tip supports various line widths, suitable for everything from precision artwork to bold strokes. This scented marker set is perfect for crafting sessions, school supplies, and makes a great addition to Easter basket stuffers.
